chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA 285 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection a/w reply at “A” 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.2914/2019 14.01.2026 Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the appellant Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for respondent It is jointly stated that the question before the court is already covered in favour of the appellant and against the respondent by virtue of judgment of the honourable Supreme Court in Civil Appeals No.225 to 546 of 2019 and other connected matters, therefore, this appeal may be allowed and the impugned judgment be set aside. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
